source: Sidherun PHB 2_8_2026.docx -- embedded image (media/image4.png), 'Skill Usage Tracking', referenced under 'Additional Skill Points Available'
notes: 'Usage Target' is how many times a skill must be used (tracked via the 'Use' circles on the Example Skill Tracker) within a level to earn the bonus. 'Bonus Points at Lvl Up' is the reward for hitting that usage target.
Level 11+ Bonus Points is given as a rate ('15 per Level') rather than an absolute value in the source -- preserved as a string.
